channel.title: Design on cláudia carvalho
channel.description: Recent content in Design on cláudia carvalho

item.title: NPS in User Experience
item.description: On a scale of 1 to 10 how likely would you recommend this post to a friend? — If you’ve seen this question before, you’ve run into an NPS survey. 👀

item.title: How to organize Figma
item.description: Anyone who’s tried Figma can see how amazing it can be! But how do you keep it tidy, organized, and scalable?
